page_metadata.biotools__summary: The NOA (Network Ontology Analysis) plugin for Cytoscape implements the NOA algorithm for network-based enrichment analysis, which extends Gene Ontology annotations to network links, or edges.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The NOA (Network Ontology Analysis) plugin for Cytoscape implements the NOA algorithm for network-based enrichment analysis, which extends Gene Ontology annotations to network links, or edges.
